# Publication Checklist

## Release Identity

- Tag:
- Commit:
- Date:

## Required Files

- [ ] CLAIMS.md
- [ ] LIMITATIONS.md
- [ ] ASSUMPTIONS.md
- [ ] REVIEW_REPORT.md
- [ ] Reproduction commands
- [ ] Checksums

## Traceability

- [ ] Every public claim has a `CLM-...` row.
- [ ] Every scientific artifact lists task, claim, source, and assumption IDs.
- [ ] Every figure names its source manifest.

## Reproducibility

- [ ] Clean checkout install succeeds.
- [ ] Tests, lint, typing, and smoke reproduction pass.
- [ ] Raw and derived artifacts are separated.

## Boundaries

- [ ] Negative, null, and failed runs are included.
- [ ] Forbidden public claims were checked.
- [ ] No result is interpreted outside its tested domain.
